Coc-c..personality: A sensitive, chilly individual prone to chronic catarrhal conditions that worsen in cold weather. Despite being cold-natured constitutionally, once ill their complaints paradoxically improve in cool air and worsen from warmth, reflecting an inner contradictory nature.
Coc-c..mental_state: Mental symptoms are sparse but center on depression and cognitive sluggishness, with headaches worse from mental exertion. There is a characteristic waking state with basilar or frontal headache, and mental faculties are dulled under a pervasive sense of gloom described as a cloud hanging over everything.
Coc-c..emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is deep sadness and apprehensiveness, with anxiety most pronounced between 2 and 4 A.M. This melancholic disposition may unpredictably alternate with periods of loquacity and liveliness, resembling the oscillating emotional pattern seen in Lachesis.
